sources.title: Regulator Notice 2026-14
sources.text: Effective 1 January 2027, covered entities must complete an annual data protection impact assessment. The reporting deadline for breaches is reduced from 72 hours to 48 hours.

changes.text: Covered entities must now complete an annual data protection impact assessment.

citations.quote: covered entities must complete an annual data protection impact assessment

changes.text: The breach reporting deadline is shortened to 48 hours.
